title: mapania alpina
intro: Mapania alpina, also known as the Alpine Mapania, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Australia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Mapania alpina lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Mapania alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
